name: Move Altrincham
facilities: The new look centre, branded move Altrincham, benefits from a 25m swimming pool, a 20m learner pool, a pool pod to improve accessibility, a combined lobby area with pool viewing and café, a wet village change, an inclusive changing places toilet and The Cove Spa - a stunning health and wellbeing spa facility. There is also a wellness assessment room, an enlarged fitness suite, fitness changing and dry change areas, two flexible studio spaces, an immersive indoor cycle studio, a four-court sports hall and storage, a gymnastics hub and staff rooms, and offices.

name: Sale Leisure Centre
facilities: Sale has a multifunctional gym, spinning studio, 25-metre main swimming pool & a small kids swimming pool and also a club training pool, spectator area, sports hall, badminton, and more.

name: Stretford Sports Village, Chester Centre
facilities: Stretford has a multifunctional gym and studio, a ladies gym, a 25-metre swimming pool and a small swimming pool, a sports hall, badminton, and more.

name: Stretford Sports Village, Talbot Centre
facilities: The Talbot Centre provides the local community with modern leisure, health and wellbeing facilities. The centre provides a comprehensive leisure package with activities and sessions for the whole community.

name: Stretford Sports Village, Chester and Talbot Centres Parking
Stretford Sports Village, Old Trafford Sports Barn
facilities: Sports Hall (4 x Badminton courts), Outdoor Artificial 3G floodlght pitch, Outdoor Hard Courts, Disabled Changing facilities.

name: Stretford Sports Village, Old Trafford Sports Barn Parking
Partington Sports Village
facilities: Due to ongoing refurbishment work at Partington Sports Centre, please be aware that our facilities are currently limited. At this time, only the outdoor football pitches are available for use. For access to swimming, gym facilities, and other activities, we encourage you to visit Sale Leisure Centre or Stretford Leisure Centre.

name: Move Urmston
facilities: Badminton, Birthdays & Events, Clip and Climb, Fitness and Wellbeing Gym, Fitness Classes, Sensory Room, Swimming, Table Tennis

name: BeActive Urmston
facilities: From our fully-refurbished gym and personal training, to our great class timetable, accessible sports like walking netball, walking football and pickleball, and versatile spaces where you can meet up with others, we help you to achieve your health and wellbeing goals and build a happier, healthier Urmston.
